professional.title: Frontend Developer
professional.description: Design and development of administrative and public-facing platforms, cutting delivery times by 50%. Implemented CI/CD pipelines, reducing production errors by more than 80%. Automated repetitive processes with UiPath and added automated testing with Jest.

freelance.title: FullStack Developer
freelance.description: Built a real-time voting system with React, Laravel and WebSockets, ensuring high availability and instant results. Designed participation dashboards with geographic segmentation. Optimized architecture and data flows, improving operational efficiency by 60%.

freelance.title: FullStack Developer
freelance.description: Modernized the teacher and student management system with Laravel and React, replacing inefficient Excel-based processes. Implemented CI/CD with GitHub Actions and optimized components and queries, cutting delivery times by 40%.

freelance.title: FullStack Developer
freelance.description: Modernized the academic management system, replacing Excel-based processes with a Laravel and React platform. Implemented CI/CD with GitHub Actions and optimized queries and components, cutting delivery times by 40%.
